C.MITCHELL, JUDGE; M.HOLMES, CSR; G.ESPINOCILLA, CLERK. 10:09 AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL. PLTF DAVID MENDEZ, IN PRO PER, PRESENT. MR. RAYMOND BURKE COUNSEL FOR ALL DEFTS PRESENT. AFTER LONG DISCUSSIONS, THE CASE IS CONTINUED TO 8/29/95 9AM FOR COURT TRIAL IN DEPT 6. A TENTATIVE SETTLE- MENT IS REACHED AND READ INTO THE RECORD. IF ALL CONDITIONS ARE MET, THEN PLTF WILL DISM ACTION AND TRIAL WILL BE TAKEN OFF CAL ON 8/29/95. IF CONDITIONS ARE NOT MET, THEN CASE WILL PROCEED TO TRIAL ON 8/29/95 9AM DEPT 6. PLTF TO PREPARE AGREEMENT TO BE SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES.
